steps.title: Find the key contrast
steps.content: The word Although signals a contrast between how the films were received initially and how they're evaluated now. The phrase their place in critics' estimations is now more secure emphasizes that critical standing has improved over time. The blank must describe something that would have created uncertainty about their value at the time of initial release.

steps.title: Match the word to the choices
steps.content: Detractors means people who criticize or speak against something — exactly what would create uncertainty about critical standing at release. The other three don't fit this contrast: precursors refers to things that come before, collaborators means people who work together, and imitators means people who copy. That matches choice A — A is correct.
